session.user:
Run the following command and report results. Do NOT fix anything, just report:
``` cd /home/runner/work/erk/erk && uv run pytest tests/tui/ tests/erk_shared/gateway/plan_data_provider/ -x -q 2>&1 | tail -30 ```
Report the full test name (file::class::method) and the complete assertion error message.
session.assistant: I'll execute the command and report the results.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run pytest on TUI and plan_data_provider tests

session.tool_result:
def test_learn_view_config(self) -> None: """LEARN_VIEW has correct configuration.""" assert LEARN_VIEW.mode == ViewMode.LEARN assert LEARN_VIEW.display_name == "Learn" > assert LEARN_VIEW.labels == ("erk-plan", "erk-learn") E AssertionError: assert ('erk-learn',) == ('erk-plan', 'erk-learn') E E At index 0 diff: 'erk-learn' != 'erk-plan' E Right contains one more item: 'erk-learn' E E Full diff: E ( E - 'erk-plan', E 'erk-learn', E )
tests/tui/views/test_types.py:41: AssertionError =========================== short test summary info ============================ FAILED tests/tui/views/test_types.py::TestViewConfig::test_learn_view_config - AssertionError: assert ('erk-learn',) == ('erk-plan', 'erk-learn')
At index 0 diff: 'erk-learn' != 'erk-plan' Right contains one more item: 'erk-learn'
Full diff: ( - 'erk-plan', 'erk-learn', ) !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!! stopping after 1 failures !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
session.assistant:
**Test Failure Report:**
**Full test name:** `tests/tui/views/test_types.py::TestViewConfig::test_learn_view_config`
**Assertion error message:** ``` AssertionError: assert ('erk-learn',) == ('erk-plan', 'erk-learn')
At index 0 diff: 'erk-learn' != 'erk-plan' Right contains one more item: 'erk-learn'
Full diff: - 'erk-plan', 'erk-learn', ```
**Details:** The test expects `LEARN_VIEW.labels` to equal `("erk-plan", "erk-learn")`, but the actual value is `("erk-learn",)`. The tuple is missing the `'erk-plan'` label at index 0.
